subcodes.first_line: O Sulayman! Follow the example of that sovereign of the exalted throne of mighty dominion, and become an intimate companion to all the beasts of the field and birds of the air [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیمان تاسی بان امیر سریر سلطنت عظمی نما و با جمیع وحوش و طیور همدم و همراز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @Moses, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
